test.create_query: CREATE TABLE topk_join_l (id UInt64, k Int64, payload String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id
CREATE TABLE topk_join_r (id UInt64, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO topk_join_l SELECT number, sipHash64(number), repeat('a', 16) FROM numbers(5000000)
INSERT INTO topk_join_r SELECT number, repeat('b', 16) FROM numbers(5000000)
test.query: SELECT l.id, l.k, r.value FROM topk_join_l AS l LEFT JOIN topk_join_r AS r ON r.id = l.id ORDER BY l.k DESC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null

SELECT l.id, l.k FROM topk_join_l AS l LEFT JOIN topk_join_r AS r1 ON r1.id = l.id LEFT JOIN topk_join_r AS r2 ON r2.id = l.id LEFT JOIN topk_join_r AS r3 ON r3.id = l.id ORDER BY l.k DESC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
SELECT l.id, l.k, r.value FROM topk_join_l AS l INNER JOIN topk_join_r AS r ON r.id = l.id ORDER BY l.k DESC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
